runner.model_identifier_scope: Exact CLI request value; the backend's immutable model snapshot was not independently observable.
runner.tool_access: Disabled with --tools followed by an empty argument.
runner.working_directory_state: Empty and outside the repository before and after the run.

invocation.stdin: Exact prompt.txt UTF-8 bytes without BOM, written by StreamWriter.Write through redirected standard input and then closed.
invocation.stdout: Captured asynchronously with ReadToEnd and written unchanged as UTF-8 without BOM to raw-output.txt.
invocation.stderr: Captured asynchronously with ReadToEnd; exact value was an empty string.

environment.text_encoding: UTF-8 without BOM for preserved artifacts
environment.credential_mechanism: Existing Claude Code authentication; no secret was recorded.
environment.repository_access: No repository filesystem was present in the working directory and tool access was disabled. The prompt intentionally contained the generated route catalog and answer-free opaque cases, but not the answer-bearing source records or any other repository content.
environment.discovered_skill_state: Not independently enumerated; slash commands were disabled and the external working directory was empty.

extraction.method: raw-output.txt was already valid JSONL and was copied byte-for-byte to predictions.jsonl.
